classic: Never have I ever ghosted someone after a first date.
Never have I ever lied about my age to get into a club or movie.
Never have I ever sent a risky text to the wrong person.
Never have I ever snooped through someone else's phone.
Never have I ever stolen something small from a hotel room.
Never have I ever skipped work or school just because I didn't want to go.
Never have I ever kissed more than one person in the same night.
Never have I ever accidentally said 'I love you' and immediately regretted it.
Never have I ever been thrown out of a bar or restaurant.
Never have I ever created a fake social media account to stalk someone.
bbf: Never have I ever used a family secret as blackmail material against a cousin.
Never have I ever shown up unannounced at another relative's house just to eat their food.
Never have I ever been the main topic of gossip on the family WhatsApp group.
Never have I ever completely exaggerated a story to make my side of the family look better.
Never have I ever stolen the spotlight at a family wedding or major event.
Never have I ever actively avoided sitting next to that one specific uncle who talks too much about politics.
Never have I ever 'borrowed' an expensive outfit or jewelry from a cousin and conveniently forgotten to return it.
Never have I ever accidentally forwarded a message to the entire family group that was meant for just one person.
Never have I ever judged someone else's parenting skills at a family gathering.
Never have I ever sneakily regifted a present to another family member.
Never have I ever taken credit for a dish I bought from a restaurant and claimed I cooked it.
Never have I ever lied about being 'stuck in traffic' when I was actually just running late.
Never have I ever faked an illness to get out of a tedious family pooja or dinner.
Never have I ever muted the chaotic family group chat for an entire year.
Never have I ever held a grudge over something that happened at a family vacation two decades ago.
Never have I ever tried to mediate a fight between the older siblings and ended up getting yelled at by both.
Never have I ever sneakily eaten the best part of the dessert before serving it to the guests.
Never have I ever covered up for a cousin when they were doing something totally forbidden in their teens.
Never have I ever compared my spouse to someone else's spouse in the family.
Never have I ever deeply appreciated how we all show up for each other, no matter what.
guilty_pleasures: Never have I ever binge-watched an entire season of a show in one day.
Never have I ever eaten food that fell on the floor after the 5-second rule.
Never have I ever listened to a cheesy pop song on repeat for hours.
Never have I ever pretended to be on a phone call to avoid someone.
Never have I ever worn the same underwear two days in a row.
Never have I ever eaten a whole tub of ice cream by myself.
Never have I ever practiced an argument in the mirror.
Never have I ever bought something online and immediately regretted it.
Never have I ever stalked an ex's new partner on Instagram.
Never have I ever lied about seeing a critically acclaimed movie just to fit in.
